attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
 SUM(STG.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT   ) AS DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT
,SUM(STG.DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT  )  AS DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT
,SUM(STG.DD_COMP_US_COST_AMOUNT) AS DD_COMP_US_COST_AMOUNT              
,SUM(STG.DD_EXTENDED_QUANTITY            ) AS DD_EXTENDED_QUANTITY
,STG.SALES_ORDER_KEY               
,STG.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY          
,STG.BOOKINGS_PRODUCT_KEY    
,STG.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          
,STG.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          
,STG.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY                         
,STG.DV_END_CUSTOMER_KEY
,STG.END_CUSTOMER_KEY  
 ,STG.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY   
,STG.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE  
,STG.CORPORATE_BOOKINGS_FLG        
,STG.SERVICE_FLG                   
,STG.WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT      
 ,STG.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT      
 ,STG.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY
 ,STG.DV_DRCT_VAL_ADDED_DSTI_ORD_FLG
 ,STG.CHANNEL_BOOKINGS_FLG          
 ,STG.CHANNEL_DROP_SHIP_FLG      
 ,NSCLTS.BK_SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM       
,NSCLTS.BK_SVC_CNTRCT_LINE_START_DTM    
,NSCLTS.SVC_CNTRCT_LINE_END_DTM       
,NSCLTS.TERMINATED_DTM                
,NSCLTS.TERMINATED_REASON_SHORT_DESCR 
,NSCLTS.SERVICE_STATUS_CD  
,STG.IP_GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY     
,STG.INSTALLATION_DT  
,STG.DU_INSTALLATION_QTY                      
,STG.INSTANCE_STATUS_CD            
,STG.SOURCE_ORDER_NUM              
,STG.DV_RMA_FLG                                        
,STG.DU_BK_SERIAL_NUM                            
,STG.DU_WARRANTY_CNTRCT_LN_END_DT  
,STG.INSTALLED_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY
,STG.IP_SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
,STG.IP_BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY  
,STG.IP_CUSTOMER_PO_NUM
,STG.IP_CUSTOMER_PO_TYPE_CD
,STG.IP_SHIPMENT_CONFIRMED_DTM
,STG.DV_REVENUE_RECOGNITION_FLG    AS DV_REVENUE_RECOGNITION_FLG    /* Added as part of true demand bkgs definition*/   
,STG.DV_NET_SPREAD_FLG             AS DV_NET_SPREAD_FLG           /* Added as part of true demand bkgs definition*/  
FROM 
$$STGDB.WI_BKGS_BY_SOL_IP_BY_MTH_M STG, $$STGDB.WI_BKGS_SVC_LINES_WITH_IP_M NSCLTS
WHERE  NSCLTS.IP_KEY=  STG.IP_KEY            
GROUP BY STG.SALES_ORDER_KEY               
,STG.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY          
,STG.BOOKINGS_PRODUCT_KEY    
,STG.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          
,STG.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          
,STG.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY                         
,STG.DV_END_CUSTOMER_KEY
,STG.END_CUSTOMER_KEY  
 ,STG.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY   
,STG.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE  
,STG.CORPORATE_BOOKINGS_FLG        
,STG.SERVICE_FLG                   
,STG.WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT      
 ,STG.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT      
 ,STG.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY
 ,STG.DV_DRCT_VAL_ADDED_DSTI_ORD_FLG
 ,STG.CHANNEL_BOOKINGS_FLG          
 ,STG.CHANNEL_DROP_SHIP_FLG      
 ,NSCLTS.BK_SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM       
,NSCLTS.BK_SVC_CNTRCT_LINE_START_DTM    
,NSCLTS.SVC_CNTRCT_LINE_END_DTM       
,NSCLTS.TERMINATED_DTM                
,NSCLTS.TERMINATED_REASON_SHORT_DESCR 
,NSCLTS.SERVICE_STATUS_CD  
,STG.IP_GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY     
,STG.INSTALLATION_DT  
,STG.DU_INSTALLATION_QTY                      
,STG.INSTANCE_STATUS_CD            
,STG.SOURCE_ORDER_NUM              
,STG.DV_RMA_FLG                                        
,STG.DU_BK_SERIAL_NUM                            
,STG.DU_WARRANTY_CNTRCT_LN_END_DT  
,STG.INSTALLED_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY
,STG.IP_SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
,STG.IP_BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY  
,STG.IP_CUSTOMER_PO_NUM
,STG.IP_CUSTOMER_PO_TYPE_CD
,STG.IP_SHIPMENT_CONFIRMED_DTM
,STG.DV_REVENUE_RECOGNITION_FLG   /* Added as part of true demand bkgs definition*/  
,STG.DV_NET_SPREAD_FLG  /* Added as part of true demand bkgs definition*/
